Add seed activities", "time": {"start": 1782053458130, "end": 1782053459127}, "id": "prt_eeaa9d0d20011HK7asqUnQoi96", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaa9c6d9002z9BRiiOozEWi7p"}, {"type": "tool", "tool": "write", "callID": "call_00_CUCJo0pDzcJPsAY9oEL48663", "state": {"status": "completed", "input": {"filePath": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/backend/main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException, Query\nfrom fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\nfrom typing import Optional\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nfrom database import engine, Base, get_db\nfrom models import TeamLead, Campaign, ActivityLog\nfrom schemas import (\n TeamLeadCreate, TeamLeadUpdate, TeamLeadResponse, TeamLeadDetailResponse,\n CampaignCreate, CampaignUpdate, CampaignResponse, ActivityLogResponse,\n)\n\nBase.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n\napp = FastAPI(title=\"Marketing Team Lead Management\")\n\napp.add_middleware(\n CORSMiddleware,\n allow_origins=[\"*\"],\n allow_credentials=True,\n allow_methods=[\"*\"],\n allow_headers=[\"*\"],\n)\n\n\ndef log_activity(db: Session, action: str, entity_type: str, entity_id: int, entity_name: str, details: str = None):\n log = ActivityLog(\n action=action,\n entity_type=entity_type,\n entity_id=entity_id,\n entity_name=entity_name,\n details=details,\n )\n db.add(log)\n db.commit()\n\n\n@app.get(\"/api/leads\", response_model=list[TeamLeadResponse])\ndef list_leads(\n search: Optional[str] = Query(None),\n department: Optional[str] = Query(None),\n db: Session = Depends(get_db),\n):\n query = db.query(TeamLead)\n if search:\n like = f\"%{search}%\"\n query = query.filter(\n TeamLead.name.ilike(like) | TeamLead.email.ilike(like)\n )\n if department:\n query = query.filter(TeamLead.department == department)\n return query.all()\n\n\n@app.post(\"/api/leads\", response_model=TeamLeadResponse, status_code=201)\ndef create_lead(lead: TeamLeadCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n existing = db.query(TeamLead).filter(TeamLead.email == lead.email).first()\n if existing:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"Email already exists\")\n db_lead = TeamLead(**lead.model_dump())\n db.add(db_lead)\n db.commit()\n db.refresh(db_lead)\n log_activity(db, \"created\", \"lead\", db_lead.id, db_lead.name)\n return db_lead\n\n\n@app.get(\"/api/leads/{lead_id}\", response_model=TeamLeadDetailResponse)\ndef get_lead(lead_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n lead = db.query(TeamLead).filter(TeamLead.id == lead_id).first()\n if not lead:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Team lead not found\")\n return lead\n\n\n@app.put(\"/api/leads/{lead_id}\", response_model=TeamLeadResponse)\ndef update_lead(lead_id: int, lead: TeamLeadUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n db_lead = db.query(TeamLead).filter(TeamLead.id == lead_id).first()\n if not db_lead:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Team lead not found\")\n\n update_data = lead.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)\n if \"email\" in update_data:\n existing = db.query(TeamLead).filter(\n TeamLead.email == update_data[\"email\"],\n TeamLead.id != lead_id,\n ).first()\n if existing:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"Email already in use\")\n\n changed = {k: v for k, v in update_data.items()}\n for key, value in update_data.items():\n setattr(db_lead, key, value)\n db.commit()\n db.refresh(db_lead)\n log_activity(db, \"updated\", \"lead\", db_lead.id, db_lead.name, str(changed) if changed else None)\n return db_lead\n\n\n@app.delete(\"/api/leads/{lead_id}\", status_code=204)\ndef delete_lead(lead_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n db_lead = db.query(TeamLead).filter(TeamLead.id == lead_id).first()\n if not db_lead:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Team lead not found\")\n name = db_lead.name\n db.delete(db_lead)\n db.commit()\n log_activity(db, \"deleted\", \"lead\", lead_id, name)\n return None\n\n\n@app.get(\"/api/campaigns\", response_model=list[CampaignResponse])\ndef list_campaigns(\n lead_id: Optional[int] = Query(None),\n status: Optional[str] = Query(None),\n campaign_type: Optional[str] = Query(None),\n db: Session = Depends(get_db),\n):\n query = db.query(Campaign)\n if lead_id is not None:\n query = query.filter(Campaign.team_lead_id == lead_id)\n if status:\n query = query.filter(Campaign.status == status)\n if campaign_type:\n query = query.filter(Campaign.campaign_type == campaign_type)\n return query.all()\n\n\n@app.post(\"/api/campaigns\", response_model=CampaignResponse, status_code=201)\ndef create_campaign(campaign: CampaignCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n lead = db.query(TeamLead).filter(TeamLead.id == campaign.team_lead_id).first()\n if not lead:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Team lead not found\")\n db_campaign = Campaign(**campaign.model_dump())\n db.add(db_campaign)\n db.commit()\n db.refresh(db_campaign)\n log_activity(db, \"created\", \"campaign\", db_campaign.id, db_campaign.name, f\"Lead: {lead.name}\")\n return db_campaign\n\n\n@app.put(\"/api/campaigns/{campaign_id}\", response_model=CampaignResponse)\ndef update_campaign(campaign_id: int, campaign: CampaignUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n db_campaign = db.query(Campaign).filter(Campaign.id == campaign_id).first()\n if not db_campaign:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Campaign not found\")\n\n update_data = campaign.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)\n if \"team_lead_id\" in update_data:\n lead = db.query(TeamLead).filter(TeamLead.id == update_data[\"team_lead_id\"]).first()\n if not lead:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Team lead not found\")\n\n changed = {k: v for k, v in update_data.items()}\n for key, value in update_data.items():\n setattr(db_campaign, key, value)\n db.commit()\n db.refresh(db_campaign)\n log_activity(db, \"updated\", \"campaign\", db_campaign.id, db_campaign.name, str(changed) if changed else None)\n return db_campaign\n\n\n@app.get(\"/api/campaigns/{campaign_id}\", response_model=CampaignResponse)\ndef get_campaign(campaign_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n campaign = db.query(Campaign).filter(Campaign.id == campaign_id).first()\n if not campaign:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Campaign not found\")\n return campaign\n\n\n@app.delete(\"/api/campaigns/{campaign_id}\", status_code=204)\ndef delete_campaign(campaign_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n db_campaign = db.query(Campaign).filter(Campaign.id == campaign_id).first()\n if not db_campaign:\n raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Campaign not found\")\n name = db_campaign.name\n db.delete(db_campaign)\n db.commit()\n log_activity(db, \"deleted\", \"campaign\", campaign_id, name)\n return None\n\n\n@app.get(\"/api/activities\", response_model=list[ActivityLogResponse])\ndef list_activities(limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200), db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n return db.query(ActivityLog).order_by(ActivityLog.created_at.desc()).limit(limit).all()\n\n\n@app.get(\"/api/dashboard/summary\")\ndef dashboard_summary(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n total_leads = db.query(TeamLead).count()\n total_campaigns = db.query(Campaign).count()\n active_campaigns = db.query(Campaign).filter(\n Campaign.status.in_([\"Planning\", \"In Progress\"])\n ).count()\n completed_campaigns = db.query(Campaign).filter(\n Campaign.status == \"Completed\"\n ).count()\n\n status_breakdown = {}\n for row in db.query(Campaign.status, Campaign.id).all():\n status_breakdown[row[0]] = status_breakdown.get(row[0], 0) + 1\n\n department_breakdown = {}\n for row in db.query(TeamLead.department, TeamLead.id).all():\n department_breakdown[row[0]] = department_breakdown.get(row[0], 0) + 1\n\n return {\n \"total_leads\": total_leads,\n \"total_campaigns\": total_campaigns,\n \"active_campaigns\": active_campaigns,\n \"completed_campaigns\": completed_campaigns,\n \"status_breakdown\": status_breakdown,\n \"department_breakdown\": department_breakdown,\n }\n\n\n@app.get(\"/api/seed\")\ndef seed_data(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):\n from datetime import date\n\n if db.query(TeamLead).count() > 0:\n return {\"message\": \"Data already seeded\"}\n\n leads = [\n TeamLead(name=\"Alice Johnson\", email=\"alice@company.com\", department=\"Social Media\", phone=\"555-0101\"),\n TeamLead(name=\"Bob Smith\", email=\"bob@company.com\", department=\"Email Marketing\", phone=\"555-0102\"),\n TeamLead(name=\"Carol Davis\", email=\"carol@company.com\", department=\"Content\", phone=\"555-0103\"),\n ]\n db.add_all(leads)\n db.commit()\n for l in leads:\n db.refresh(l)\n\n campaigns = [\n Campaign(name=\"Summer Sale Social\", campaign_type=\"Social\", channel=\"Instagram\", status=\"In Progress\", progress=45, start_date=date(2026, 1, 1), team_lead_id=leads[0].id),\n Campaign(name=\"Facebook Retargeting\", campaign_type=\"Social\", channel=\"Facebook\", status=\"Planning\", progress=10, start_date=date(2026, 2, 1), team_lead_id=leads[0].id),\n Campaign(name=\"Weekly Newsletter\", campaign_type=\"Email\", channel=\"Email\", status=\"Completed\", progress=100, start_date=date(2026, 1, 15), target_end_date=date(2026, 3, 1), team_lead_id=leads[1].id),\n Campaign(name=\"Product Launch Email\", campaign_type=\"Email\", channel=\"Email\", status=\"In Progress\", progress=70, start_date=date(2026, 3, 1), team_lead_id=leads[1].id),\n Campaign(name=\"Blog SEO Overhaul\", campaign_type=\"SEO\", channel=\"Organic\", status=\"On Hold\", progress=30, start_date=date(2026, 2, 15), team_lead_id=leads[2].id),\n ]\n db.add_all(campaigns)\n db.commit()\n\n for l in leads:\n log_activity(db, \"created\", \"lead\", l.id, l.name)\n for c in campaigns:\n log_activity(db, \"created\", \"campaign\", c.id, c.name)\n\n return {\"message\": \"Seed data created\", \"leads\": len(leads), \"campaigns\": len(campaigns)}\n"}, "output": "Wrote file successfully.", "metadata": {"diagnostics": {}, "filepath": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/backend/main.py", "exists": true, "prt_eeaaa5533001cdQE5ah7EArEB3", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaaa47d1002u8AaUNo7Ud6kqk"}, {"type": "tool", "tool": "edit", "callID": "call_00_yY6RWx47sNAjbvsodTHF4822", "state": {"status": "completed", "input": {"filePath": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/style.css", "oldString": "/* --- Scrollbar --- */", "newString": "/* --- Tabs --- */\n.tabs {\n display: flex;\n gap: 0;\n margin-bottom: 16px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n}\n\n.tab {\n padding: 10px 20px;\n background: none;\n border: none;\n border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;\n font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;\n font-size: 13px;\n font-weight: 500;\n color: var(--text-muted);\n cursor: pointer;\n transition: all 0.15s;\n margin-bottom: -1px;\n}\n\n.tab:hover {\n color: var(--fg);\n}\n\n.tab-active {\n color: var(--fg);\n border-bottom-color: var(--fg);\n}\n\n.view {\n display: none;\n}\n\n.view-active {\n display: block;\n}\n\n/* --- Timeline --- */\n.timeline-container {\n background: var(--surface);\n border: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n border-radius: var(--radius);\n overflow-x: auto;\n padding: 20px;\n}\n\n.timeline-header {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 16px;\n margin-bottom: 16px;\n}\n\n.timeline-header h3 {\n font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;\n font-size: 15px;\n font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.timeline-scroll {\n min-width: 600px;\n position: relative;\n}\n\n.timeline-months {\n display: flex;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n margin-bottom: 4px;\n position: sticky;\n top: 0;\n background: var(--surface);\n z-index: 2;\n}\n\n.timeline-month {\n flex: 1;\n text-align: left;\n padding: 6px 4px 6px 0;\n font-size: 11px;\n font-weight: 600;\n color: var(--text-muted);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n border-left: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n}\n\n.timeline-rows {\n position: relative;\n}\n\n.timeline-row {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n height: 36px;\n position: relative;\n}\n\n.timeline-row-label {\n width: 160px;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n font-size: 12px;\n font-weight: 500;\n padding-right: 12px;\n overflow: hidden;\n text-overflow: ellipsis;\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.timeline-track {\n flex: 1;\n height: 100%;\n position: relative;\n border-left: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n}\n\n.timeline-grid-line {\n position: absolute;\n top: 0;\n bottom: 0;\n width: 1px;\n background: var(--border-light);\n z-index: 0;\n}\n\n.timeline-bar {\n position: absolute;\n top: 8px;\n height: 20px;\n border-radius: 4px;\n z-index: 1;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n padding: 0 8px;\n font-size: 10px;\n font-weight: 500;\n color: #fff;\n white-space: nowrap;\n overflow: hidden;\n text-overflow: ellipsis;\n min-width: 12px;\n cursor: default;\n transition: opacity 0.15s;\n}\n\n.timeline-bar:hover {\n opacity: 0.85;\n}\n\n.timeline-bar.planning { background: #f59e0b; }\n.timeline-bar.in-progress { background: #3b82f6; }\n.timeline-bar.review { background: #8b5cf6; }\n.timeline-bar.completed { background: #22c55e; }\n.timeline-bar.on-hold { background: #6b7280; }\n\n.timeline-today {\n position: absolute;\n top: -8px;\n bottom: 0;\n width: 2px;\n background: var(--danger);\n z-index: 3;\n pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n.timeline-today::before {\n content: '';\n position: absolute;\n top: -2px;\n left: -4px;\n width: 10px;\n height: 10px;\n background: var(--danger);\n border-radius: 50%;\n}\n\n.timeline-empty {\n text-align: center;\n padding: 40px 20px;\n color: var(--text-muted);\n font-size: 14px;\n}\n\n/* --- Activity Log --- */\n.activity-container {\n background: var(--surface);\n border: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n border-radius: var(--radius);\n overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.activity-header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n padding: 16px 20px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n}\n\n.activity-header h3 {\n font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;\n font-size: 15px;\n font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.activity-list {\n padding: 0;\n}\n\n.activity-item {\n display: flex;\n align-items: flex-start;\n gap: 12px;\n padding: 12px 20px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n font-size: 13px;\n}\n\n.activity-item:last-child {\n border-bottom: none;\n}\n\n.activity-icon {\n width: 28px;\n height: 28px;\n border-radius: 50%;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n font-size: 13px;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n margin-top: 1px;\n}\n\n.activity-icon.created { background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; }\n.activity-icon.updated { background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af; }\n.activity-icon.deleted { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }\n\nhtml.dark-mode .activity-icon.created { background: rgba(22,101,52,0.3); color: #86efac; }\nhtml.dark-mode .activity-icon.updated { background: rgba(30,64,175,0.3); color: #93c5fd; }\nhtml.dark-mode .activity-icon.deleted { background: rgba(153,27,27,0.3); color: #fca5a5; }\n\n.activity-body {\n flex: 1;\n min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.activity-action {\n font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.activity-action.created { color: #16a34a; }\n.activity-action.updated { color: #2563eb; }\n.activity-action.deleted { color: #dc2626; }\n\nhtml.dark-mode .activity-action.created { color: #86efac; }\nhtml.dark-mode .activity-action.updated { color: #93c5fd; }\nhtml.dark-mode .activity-action.deleted { color: #fca5a5; }\n\n.activity-entity {\n font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.activity-details {\n font-size: 11px;\n color: var(--text-muted);\n margin-top: 1px;\n}\n\n.activity-time {\n font-size: 11px;\n color: var(--text-muted);\n white-space: nowrap;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n margin-top: 2px;\n}\n\n.activity-empty {\n text-align: center;\n padding: 40px 20px;\n color: var(--text-muted);\n font-size: 14px;\n}\n\n/* --- Scrollbar --- */"}, "output": "Edit applied successfully.", "metadata": {"diagnostics": {}, "diff": "Index: margin-bottom: 16px;\n+ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n+}\n+\n+.tab {\n+ padding: 10px 20px;\n+ background: none;\n+ border: none;\n+ border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;\n+ font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;\n+ font-size: 13px;\n+ font-weight: 500;\n+ color: var(--text-muted);\n+ cursor: pointer;\n+ transition: all 0.15s;\n+ margin-bottom: -1px;\n+}\n+\n+.tab:hover {\n+ color: var(--fg);\n+}\n+\n+.tab-active {\n+ color: var(--fg);\n+ border-bottom-color: var(--fg);\n+}\n+\n+.view {\n+ display: none;\n+}\n+\n+.view-active {\n+ display: block;\n+}\n+\n+/* --- Timeline --- */\n+.timeline-container {\n+ background: var(--surface);\n+ border: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n+ border-radius: var(--radius);\n+ overflow-x: auto;\n+ padding: 20px;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-header {\n+ display: flex;\n+ align-items: center;\n+ gap: 16px;\n+ margin-bottom: 16px;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-header h3 {\n+ font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;\n+ font-size: 15px;\n+ font-weight: 700;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-scroll {\n+ min-width: 600px;\n+ position: relative;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-months {\n+ display: flex;\n+ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n+ margin-bottom: 4px;\n+ position: sticky;\n+ top: 0;\n+ background: var(--surface);\n+ z-index: 2;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-month {\n+ flex: 1;\n+ text-align: left;\n+ padding: 6px 4px 6px 0;\n+ font-size: 11px;\n+ font-weight: 600;\n+ color: var(--text-muted);\n+ text-transform: uppercase;\n+ letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n+ border-left: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-rows {\n+ position: relative;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-row {\n+ display: flex;\n+ align-items: center;\n+ height: 36px;\n+ position: relative;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-row-label {\n+ width: 160px;\n+ flex-shrink: 0;\n+ font-size: 12px;\n+ font-weight: 500;\n+ padding-right: 12px;\n+ overflow: hidden;\n+ text-overflow: ellipsis;\n+ white-space: nowrap;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-track {\n+ flex: 1;\n+ height: 100%;\n+ position: relative;\n+ border-left: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-grid-line {\n+ position: absolute;\n+ top: 0;\n+ bottom: 0;\n+ width: 1px;\n+ background: var(--border-light);\n+ z-index: 0;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-bar {\n+ position: absolute;\n+ top: 8px;\n+ height: 20px;\n+ border-radius: 4px;\n+ z-index: 1;\n+ display: flex;\n+ align-items: center;\n+ padding: 0 8px;\n+ font-size: 10px;\n+ font-weight: 500;\n+ color: #fff;\n+ white-space: nowrap;\n+ overflow: hidden;\n+ text-overflow: ellipsis;\n+ min-width: 12px;\n+ cursor: default;\n+ transition: opacity 0.15s;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-bar:hover {\n+ opacity: 0.85;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-bar.planning { background: #f59e0b; }\n+.timeline-bar.in-progress { background: #3b82f6; }\n+.timeline-bar.review { background: #8b5cf6; }\n+.timeline-bar.completed { background: #22c55e; }\n+.timeline-bar.on-hold { background: #6b7280; }\n+\n+.timeline-today {\n+ position: absolute;\n+ top: -8px;\n+ bottom: 0;\n+ width: 2px;\n+ background: var(--danger);\n+ z-index: 3;\n+ pointer-events: none;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-today::before {\n+ content: '';\n+ position: absolute;\n+ top: -2px;\n+ left: -4px;\n+ width: 10px;\n+ height: 10px;\n+ background: var(--danger);\n+ border-radius: 50%;\n+}\n+\n+.timeline-empty {\n+ text-align: center;\n+ padding: 40px 20px;\n+ color: var(--text-muted);\n+ font-size: 14px;\n+}\n+\n+/* --- Activity Log --- */\n+.activity-container {\n+ background: var(--surface);\n+ border: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n+ border-radius: var(--radius);\n+ overflow: hidden;\n+}\n+\n+.activity-header {\n+ display: flex;\n+ justify-content: space-between;\n+ align-items: center;\n+ padding: 16px 20px;\n+ border-bottom: 1px solid "messageID": "msg_eeaaa47d1002u8AaUNo7Ud6kqk"}, {"reason": "tool-calls", "type": "step-finish", "tokens": {"total": 126565, "input": 53, "output": 1818, "reasoning": 22, "cache": {"write": 0, "read": 124672}}, "cost": 0, "id": "prt_eeaaa8351001E4ngjslLJHb5E3", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaaa47d1002u8AaUNo7Ud6kqk"}]}, {"info": {"parentID": "msg_eeaa93f5a0017srF68xDXo2zUW", "role": "assistant", "mode": "build", "agent": "build", "path": {"cwd": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp", "root": "/"}, "cost": 0, "tokens": {"total": 128770, "input": 116, "output": 2158, "reasoning": 32, "cache": {"write": 0, "read": 126464}}, "modelID": "deepseek-v4-flash-free", "providerID": "opencode", "time": {"created": 1782053503832, "completed": 1782053525038}, "finish": "tool-calls", "id": "msg_eeaaa8358002h27VLIJ2NrRS6n", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6"}, "parts": [{"type": "step-start", "id": "prt_eeaaa8b740011BRfwxfaWNi7Av", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaaa8358002h27VLIJ2NrRS6n"}, {"type": "reasoning", "text": "Now let me update script.js with the new functions for timeline rendering, activity log rendering, and tab switching. I'll add them after the seedData function.", "time": {"start": 1782053508307, "end": 1782053509090}, "id": "prt_eeaaa94d3001CYEjKCqNgsg8cG", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaaa8358002h27VLIJ2NrRS6n"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Now add the JS for tabs, timeline, and activity:", "time": {"start": 1782053509094, "end": 1782053525015}, "id": "prt_eeaaa97e6001SFxrwrwyYszqJQ", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaaa8358002h27VLIJ2NrRS6n"}, {"type": "tool", "tool": "edit", "callID": "call_00_8i9nzAqjwHg0ymkJGqEJ7161", "state": {"status": "completed", "input": {"filePath": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js", "oldString": "async function seedData() {\n try {\n const result = await apiFetch('/api/seed');\n showToast(result.message);\n renderLeads();\n renderSummary();\n } catch (e) {\n showToast(e.message, 'error');\n }\n}", "newString": "async function seedData() {\n try {\n const result = await apiFetch('/api/seed');\n showToast(result.message);\n renderLeads();\n renderSummary();\n renderTimeline();\n renderActivity();\n } catch (e) {\n showToast(e.message, 'error');\n }\n}\n\n// --- Tabs ---\nfunction switchTab(name) {\n document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('tab-active'));\n document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('view-active'));\n document.getElementById(`tab-${name}`).classList.add('tab-active');\n document.getElementById(`view-${name}`).classList.add('view-active');\n\n if (name === 'timeline') renderTimeline();\n if (name === 'activity') renderActivity();\n}\n\n// --- Timeline ---\nasync function renderTimeline() {\n const container = document.getElementById('timelineContainer');\n if (!container) return;\n try {\n const campaigns = await apiFetch('/api/campaigns');\n if (campaigns.length === 0) {\n container.innerHTML = '

No campaigns to show on timeline.

';\n return;\n }\n\n // Find date range with padding\n const today = new Date();\n let minDate = null, maxDate = null;\n const cData = [];\n for (const c of campaigns) {\n const start = new Date(c.start_date);\n const end = c.target_end_date ? new Date(c.target_end_date) : new Date(start);\n // Extend end by 30 days if no target end date\n const endAdj = c.target_end_date ? new Date(end) : new Date(Math.max(end.getTime(), today.getTime()));\n // Extend ongoing campaigns to today\n if (c.status !== 'Completed' && c.status !== 'On Hold' && endAdj < today) {\n endAdj.setTime(today.getTime());\n }\n if (!minDate || start < minDate) minDate = new Date(start);\n if (!maxDate || endAdj > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(endAdj);\n\n const lead = await apiFetch(`/api/leads/${c.team_lead_id}`);\n cData.push({ ...c, start, end: endAdj, leadName: lead.name });\n }\n\n // Add 1 month padding\n minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() - 1);\n maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n\n // Ensure today is within range\n if (today < minDate) minDate = new Date(today);\n if (today > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(today);\n maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n\n const totalMs = maxDate.getTime() - minDate.getTime();\n if (totalMs <= 0) return;\n\n // Generate month headers\n const months = [];\n const cursor = new Date(minDate.getFullYear(), minDate.getMonth(), 1);\n while (cursor <= maxDate) {\n months.push(new Date(cursor));\n cursor.setMonth(cursor.getMonth() + 1);\n }\n\n const monthNames = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];\n const monthWidth = 100 / months.length;\n\n const fmtDate = (d) => `${monthNames[d.getMonth()]} ${d.getDate()}`;\n\n let html = `\n
\n

Campaign Timeline

\n ${campaigns.length} campaigns · ${fmtDate(minDate)} — ${fmtDate(maxDate)}\n
\n
\n
\n ${months.map(m => `
${monthNames[m.getMonth()]} ${m.getFullYear()}
`).join('')}\n
\n
\n ${cData.map(c => {\n const pctStart = Math.max(0, (c.start.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100);\n const pctEnd = Math.min(100, Math.max(pctStart + 1, (c.end.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100));\n const pctWidth = pctEnd - pctStart;\n const statusClass = c.status.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-');\n const barLabel = c.name.length > 20 ? c.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : c.name;\n return `\n
\n
${c.name} · ${c.leadName}
\n
\n
\n ${barLabel}\n
\n
\n
\n `;\n }).join('')}\n
\n
\n `;\n\n // Add today marker\n if (today >= minDate && today <= maxDate) {\n const pctToday = (today.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100;\n html += `\n \n
\n `;\n }\n\n container.innerHTML = html;\n } catch (e) {\n container.innerHTML = `

Error loading timeline: ${e.message}

`;\n }\n}\n\n// --- Activity Log ---\nasync function renderActivity() {\n const container = document.getElementById('activityContainer');\n if (!container) return;\n try {\n const activities = await apiFetch('/api/activities');\n if (activities.length === 0) {\n container.innerHTML = '
No activity recorded yet.
';\n return;\n }\n\n const now = new Date();\n const fmtTime = (d) => {\n const dt = new Date(d);\n const diff = now - dt;\n if (diff < 60000) return 'just now';\n if (diff < 3600000) return Math.floor(diff / 60000) + 'm ago';\n if (diff < 86400000) return Math.floor(diff / 3600000) + 'h ago';\n return dt.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });\n };\n\n const actionLabels = { created: 'Created', updated: 'Updated', deleted: 'Deleted' };\n const entityLabels = { lead: 'Team Lead', campaign: 'Campaign' };\n const actionIcons = { created: '+', updated: '\\u270E', deleted: '\\u2716' };\n\n container.innerHTML = `\n
\n

Recent Activity

\n ${activities.length} entries\n
\n
\n ${activities.map(a => `\n
\n
${actionIcons[a.action] || '\\u2022'}
\n
\n
\n ${actionLabels[a.action] || a.action}\n ${a.entity_name}\n ${entityLabels[a.entity_type] || a.entity_type}\n
\n ${a.details ? `
${a.details}
` : ''}\n
\n
${fmtTime(a.created_at)}
\n
\n `).join('')}\n
\n `;\n } catch (e) {\n container.innerHTML = `
Error loading activity: ${e.message}
`;\n }\n}"}, "output": "Edit applied successfully.", "metadata": {"diagnostics": {}, "diff": "Index: /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js\n===================================================================\n--- /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js\n+++ /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js\n@@ -618,8 +618,195 @@\n const result = await apiFetch('/api/seed');\n showToast(result.message);\n renderLeads();\n renderSummary();\n+ renderTimeline();\n+ renderActivity();\n } catch (e) {\n showToast(e.message, 'error');\n }\n }\n+\n+// --- Tabs ---\n+function switchTab(name) {\n+ document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('tab-active'));\n+ document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('view-active'));\n+ document.getElementById(`tab-${name}`).classList.add('tab-active');\n+ document.getElementById(`view-${name}`).classList.add('view-active');\n+\n+ if (name === 'timeline') renderTimeline();\n+ if (name === 'activity') renderActivity();\n+}\n+\n+// --- Timeline ---\n+async function renderTimeline() {\n+ const container = document.getElementById('timelineContainer');\n+ if (!container) return;\n+ try {\n+ const campaigns = await apiFetch('/api/campaigns');\n+ if (campaigns.length === 0) {\n+ container.innerHTML = '

No campaigns to show on timeline.

';\n+ return;\n+ }\n+\n+ // Find date range with padding\n+ const today = new Date();\n+ let minDate = null, maxDate = null;\n+ const cData = [];\n+ for (const c of campaigns) {\n+ const start = new Date(c.start_date);\n+ const end = c.target_end_date ? new Date(c.target_end_date) : new Date(start);\n+ // Extend end by 30 days if no target end date\n+ const endAdj = c.target_end_date ? new Date(end) : new Date(Math.max(end.getTime(), today.getTime()));\n+ // Extend ongoing campaigns to today\n+ if (c.status !== 'Completed' && c.status !== 'On Hold' && endAdj < today) {\n+ endAdj.setTime(today.getTime());\n+ }\n+ if (!minDate || start < minDate) minDate = new Date(start);\n+ if (!maxDate || endAdj > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(endAdj);\n+\n+ const lead = await apiFetch(`/api/leads/${c.team_lead_id}`);\n+ cData.push({ ...c, start, end: endAdj, leadName: lead.name });\n+ }\n+\n+ // Add 1 month padding\n+ minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() - 1);\n+ maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n+\n+ // Ensure today is within range\n+ if (today < minDate) minDate = new Date(today);\n+ if (today > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(today);\n+ maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n+\n+ const totalMs = maxDate.getTime() - minDate.getTime();\n+ if (totalMs <= 0) return;\n+\n+ // Generate month headers\n+ const months = [];\n+ const cursor = new Date(minDate.getFullYear(), minDate.getMonth(), 1);\n+ while (cursor <= maxDate) {\n+ months.push(new Date(cursor));\n+ cursor.setMonth(cursor.getMonth() + 1);\n+ }\n+\n+ const monthNames = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];\n+ const monthWidth = 100 / months.length;\n+\n+ const fmtDate = (d) => `${monthNames[d.getMonth()]} ${d.getDate()}`;\n+\n+ let html = `\n+
\n+

Campaign Timeline

\n+ ${campaigns.length} campaigns · ${fmtDate(minDate)} — ${fmtDate(maxDate)}\n+
\n+
\n+
\n+ ${months.map(m => `
${monthNames[m.getMonth()]} ${m.getFullYear()}
`).join('')}\n+
\n+
\n+ ${cData.map(c => {\n+ const pctStart = Math.max(0, (c.start.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100);\n+ const pctEnd = Math.min(100, Math.max(pctStart + 1, (c.end.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100));\n+ const pctWidth = pctEnd - pctStart;\n+ const statusClass = c.status.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-');\n+ const barLabel = c.name.length > 20 ? c.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : c.name;\n+ return `\n+
\n+
${c.name} · ${c.leadName}
\n+
\n+
\n+ ${barLabel}\n+
\n+
\n+
\n+ `;\n+ }).join('')}\n+
\n+
\n+ `;\n+\n+ // Add today marker\n+ if (today >= minDate && today <= maxDate) {\n+ const pctToday = (today.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100;\n+ html += `\n+ \n+
\n+ `;\n+ }\n+\n+ container.innerHTML = html;\n+ } catch (e) {\n+ container.innerHTML = `

Error loading timeline: ${e.message}

`;\n+ }\n+}\n+\n+// --- Activity Log ---\n+async function renderActivity() {\n+ const container = document.getElementById('activityContainer');\n+ if (!container) return;\n+ try {\n+ const activities = await apiFetch('/api/activities');\n+ if (activities.length === 0) {\n+ container.innerHTML = '
No activity recorded yet.
';\n+ return;\n+ }\n+\n+ const now = new Date();\n+ const fmtTime = (d) => {\n+ const dt = new Date(d);\n+ const diff = now - dt;\n+ if (diff < 60000) return 'just now';\n+ if (diff < 3600000) return Math.floor(diff / 60000) + 'm ago';\n+ if (diff < 86400000) return Math.floor(diff / 3600000) + 'h ago';\n+ return dt.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });\n+ };\n+\n+ const actionLabels = { created: 'Created', updated: 'Updated', deleted: 'Deleted' };\n+ const entityLabels = { lead: 'Team Lead', campaign: 'Campaign' };\n+ const actionIcons = { created: '+', updated: '\\u270E', deleted: '\\u2716' };\n+\n+ container.innerHTML = `\n+
\n+

Recent Activity

\n+ ${activities.length} entries\n+
\n+
\n+ ${activities.map(a => `\n+
\n+
${actionIcons[a.action] || '\\u2022'}
\n+
\n+
\n+ ${actionLabels[a.action] || a.action}\n+ ${a.entity_name}\n+ ${entityLabels[a.entity_type] || a.entity_type}\n+
\n+ ${a.details ? `
${a.details}
` : ''}\n+
\n+
${fmtTime(a.created_at)}
\n+
\n+ `).join('')}\n+
\n+ `;\n+ } catch (e) {\n+ container.innerHTML = `
Error loading activity: ${e.message}
`;\n+ }\n+}\n", "filediff": {"file": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js", "patch": "Index: /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js\n===================================================================\n--- /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js\n+++ /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js\n@@ -618,8 +618,195 @@\n const result = await apiFetch('/api/seed');\n showToast(result.message);\n renderLeads();\n renderSummary();\n+ renderTimeline();\n+ renderActivity();\n } catch (e) {\n showToast(e.message, 'error');\n }\n }\n+\n+// --- Tabs ---\n+function switchTab(name) {\n+ document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('tab-active'));\n+ document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('view-active'));\n+ document.getElementById(`tab-${name}`).classList.add('tab-active');\n+ document.getElementById(`view-${name}`).classList.add('view-active');\n+\n+ if (name === 'timeline') renderTimeline();\n+ if (name === 'activity') renderActivity();\n+}\n+\n+// --- Timeline ---\n+async function renderTimeline() {\n+ const container = document.getElementById('timelineContainer');\n+ if (!container) return;\n+ try {\n+ const campaigns = await apiFetch('/api/campaigns');\n+ if (campaigns.length === 0) {\n+ container.innerHTML = '

No campaigns to show on timeline.

';\n+ return;\n+ }\n+\n+ // Find date range with padding\n+ const today = new Date();\n+ let minDate = null, maxDate = null;\n+ const cData = [];\n+ for (const c of campaigns) {\n+ const start = new Date(c.start_date);\n+ const end = c.target_end_date ? new Date(c.target_end_date) : new Date(start);\n+ // Extend end by 30 days if no target end date\n+ const endAdj = c.target_end_date ? new Date(end) : new Date(Math.max(end.getTime(), today.getTime()));\n+ // Extend ongoing campaigns to today\n+ if (c.status !== 'Completed' && c.status !== 'On Hold' && endAdj < today) {\n+ endAdj.setTime(today.getTime());\n+ }\n+ if (!minDate || start < minDate) minDate = new Date(start);\n+ if (!maxDate || endAdj > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(endAdj);\n+\n+ const lead = await apiFetch(`/api/leads/${c.team_lead_id}`);\n+ cData.push({ ...c, start, end: endAdj, leadName: lead.name });\n+ }\n+\n+ // Add 1 month padding\n+ minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() - 1);\n+ maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n+\n+ // Ensure today is within range\n+ if (today < minDate) minDate = new Date(today);\n+ if (today > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(today);\n+ maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n+\n+ const totalMs = maxDate.getTime() - minDate.getTime();\n+ if (totalMs <= 0) return;\n+\n+ // Generate month headers\n+ const months = [];\n+ const cursor = new Date(minDate.getFullYear(), minDate.getMonth(), 1);\n+ while (cursor <= maxDate) {\n+ months.push(new Date(cursor));\n+ cursor.setMonth(cursor.getMonth() + 1);\n+ }\n+\n+ const monthNames = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];\n+ const monthWidth = 100 / months.length;\n+\n+ const fmtDate = (d) => `${monthNames[d.getMonth()]} ${d.getDate()}`;\n+\n+ let html = `\n+
\n+

Campaign Timeline

\n+ ${campaigns.length} campaigns · ${fmtDate(minDate)} — ${fmtDate(maxDate)}\n+
\n+
\n+
\n+ ${months.map(m => `
${monthNames[m.getMonth()]} ${m.getFullYear()}
`).join('')}\n+
\n+
\n+ ${cData.map(c => {\n+ const pctStart = Math.max(0, (c.start.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100);\n+ const pctEnd = Math.min(100, Math.max(pctStart + 1, (c.end.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100));\n+ const pctWidth = pctEnd - pctStart;\n+ const statusClass = c.status.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-');\n+ const barLabel = c.name.length > 20 ? c.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : c.name;\n+ return `\n+

${c.name} · ${c.leadName}

\n+

\n+ `;\n+ }\n+\n+ container.innerHTML = html;\n+ } catch (e) {\n+ container.innerHTML = `

Error loading timeline: ${e.message}

"sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaac0e4a002foxuTUFF0QpH2d"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Both features are built and tested locally. Here's what was added:\n\n### Activity Log\n- **New model** `ActivityLog` (action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, details, timestamp)\n- **Every CRUD operation** logs: created/updated/deleted on leads/campaigns\n- **New endpoint** `GET /api/activities` (returns latest 50, ordered by time desc)\n- **UI**: Tab \"Activity\" shows a reverse-chronological feed with colored icons (green=created, blue=updated, red=deleted), relative timestamps (\"2m ago\"), and change details\n\n### Timeline View\n- **Tab \"Timeline\"** shows campaigns as horizontal bars on a date axis\n- Each campaign is a colored bar from start_date to end_date (ongoing ones extended to today)\n- Color-coded by status (amber=planning, blue=in-progress, purple=review, green=completed, gray=on-hold)\n- **Today marker** (red dot + vertical line)\n- Month headers along the top\n- Shows campaign name + assigned lead name\n\nShould I commit and push to deploy?", "time": {"start": 1782053608686, "end": 1782053611520}, Render backend), but I was testing locally on port 8000. The Render backend doesn't have the new `/api/activities` endpoint yet because I haven't pushed the changes. The local backend has it, but the deployed frontend points to the Render backend. So when deployed, it tries to hit `https://mtl-management-system.onrender.com/api/activities` which doesn't exist yet. But wait - the user said they're seeing this error, which means they're either testing locally or the deployed version. Since I haven't committed and pushed yet, the Render backend doesn't have the new code. Let me just commit and push - that will deploy to both Render and Vercel.\n\nActually, wait. Let me re-read the error. \"Error loading activity: Not Found\" - this means the API endpoint `/api/activities` is returning a 404. Since the Render backend doesn't have this endpoint yet (not deployed), this makes sense.\n\nBut actually, the user might be testing locally. The frontend HTML has `window.API_URL = 'https://mtl-management-system.onrender.com'` hardcoded. So even if they open the local index.html, it'll try to hit the Render URL. Since I deployed the frontend to Vercel, and the backend on Render, the Render backend doesn't have the new code.\n\nThe fix is to commit and push. The Render backend will auto-deploy and get the new `/api/activities` endpoint.\n\nBut wait - actually, I need to check both. Let me first fix the actual bugs in the code (bugs 2 and 3), then commit and push.\n\n2. **Timeline red vertical line spanning the entire window height** - The `timeline-today-marker` is positioned absolutely but it needs to be contained within the `.timeline-scroll` div. Currently I'm appending it as a sibling, but it needs to be inside the `.timeline-rows` container with `position: relative`.\n\nLooking at the code:\n```js\ncontainer.innerHTML = html;\n// Add today marker\nif (today >= minDate && today <= maxDate) {\n const pctToday = ...;\n html += `\n \n
\n `;\n}\ncontainer.innerHTML = html;\n```\n\nThe problem: The `timeline-today-marker` is appended after `.timeline-scroll`, so it's positioned relative to `.timeline-container`, not within `.timeline-scroll`. And it has `position: absolute` with `top: 0; bottom: 0;` which means it stretches the full height of the nearest positioned ancestor. If `.timeline-container` doesn't have `position: relative`, it'll go up to the viewport.\n\nFix: Move the today marker INSIDE the timeline-scroll element, and ensure `.timeline-scroll` has `position: relative`.\n\n3. **Show user's name below campaign name in timeline** - Currently:\n```js\nconst barLabel = c.name.length > 20 ? c.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : c.name;\nreturn `\n
\n
${c.name} · ${c.leadName}
\n
...\n```\n\nThe label shows `Campaign Name \u00b7 Lead Name` on one line. The user wants the lead name below the campaign name instead. I should change it to two lines.\n\nLet me fix all three bugs:\n\nFor bug 1: It'll be fixed by committing and pushing (Render needs the new code).\n\nFor bug 2: I need to restructure the timeline HTML so the today marker is inside `.timeline-scroll` with `position: relative`.\n\nFor bug 3: Change the label to show name on one line, lead name below.\n\nLet me make these changes.\n\nActually, for bug 2, let me look at the generated HTML structure:\n\n```html\n
\n
...
\n
\n
...
\n ...\n
\n
\n\n
\n```\n\nThe marker is AFTER `.timeline-scroll`, so it's a sibling of it. And it has `position: absolute`. Since `.timeline-container` doesn't have `position: relative`, it would position relative to the viewport, spanning the full window height.\n\nFix:\n1. Add `position: relative` to `.timeline-scroll`\n2. Move the today marker INSIDE `.timeline-scroll` (after `.timeline-rows`)\n3. Give it `top: 0; bottom: 0;` to span the full height of the scroll container\n\nLet me also fix the bar label to show lead name below.\n\nLet me edit the script.js file.", "time": {"start": 1782053770353, "end": 1782053782604}, "id": "prt_eeaae9471001WZvsWjm62InkR9", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeaae87d9002JVe57P8bo5JxFN"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Three bugs to fix. No campaigns to show on timeline.

';\n658: return;\n659: }\n660: \n661: // Find date range with padding\n662: const today = new Date();\n663: let minDate = null, maxDate = null;\n664: const cData = [];\n665: for (const c of campaigns) {\n666: const start = new Date(c.start_date);\n667: const end = c.target_end_date ? new Date(c.target_end_date) : new Date(start);\n668: // Extend end by 30 days if no target end date\n669: const endAdj = c.target_end_date ? new Date(end) : new Date(Math.max(end.getTime(), today.getTime()));\n670: // Extend ongoing campaigns to today\n671: if (c.status !== 'Completed' && c.status !== 'On Hold' && endAdj < today) {\n672: endAdj.setTime(today.getTime());\n673: }\n674: if (!minDate || start < minDate) minDate = new Date(start);\n675: if (!maxDate || endAdj > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(endAdj);\n676: \n677: const lead = await apiFetch(`/api/leads/${c.team_lead_id}`);\n678: cData.push({ ...c, start, end: endAdj, leadName: lead.name });\n679: }\n680: \n681: // Add 1 month padding\n682: minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() - 1);\n683: maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n684: \n685: // Ensure today is within range\n686: if (today < minDate) minDate = new Date(today);\n687: if (today > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(today);\n688: maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n689: \n690: const totalMs = maxDate.getTime() - minDate.getTime();\n691: if (totalMs <= 0) return;\n692: \n693: // Generate month headers\n694: const months = [];\n695: const cursor = new Date(minDate.getFullYear(), minDate.getMonth(), 1);\n696: while (cursor <= maxDate) {\n697: months.push(new Date(cursor));\n698: cursor.setMonth(cursor.getMonth() + 1);\n699: }\n700: \n701: const monthNames = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];\n702: const monthWidth = 100 / months.length;\n703: \n704: const fmtDate = (d) => `${monthNames[d.getMonth()]} ${d.getDate()}`;\n705: \n706: let html = `\n707:

Use offset=725 to continue.)\n", "metadata": {"preview": "\n if (name === 'timeline') renderTimeline();\n if (name === 'activity') renderActivity();\n}\n\n// --- Timeline ---\nasync function renderTimeline() {\n const container = document.getElementById('timelineContainer');\n if (!container) return;\n try {\n const campaigns = await apiFetch('/api/campaigns');\n if (campaigns.length === 0) {\n container.innerHTML = '

No campaigns to show on timeline.

';\n return;\n }\n\n // Find date range with padding\n const today = new Date();\n let minDate = null, maxDate = null;\n const cData = [];", "truncated": true, "loaded": [], "display": {"type": "file", "path": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/script.js", "text": "\n if (name === 'timeline') renderTimeline();\n if (name === 'activity') renderActivity();\n}\n\n// --- Timeline ---\nasync function renderTimeline() {\n const container = document.getElementById('timelineContainer');\n if (!container) return;\n try {\n const campaigns = await apiFetch('/api/campaigns');\n if (campaigns.length === 0) {\n container.innerHTML = '

No campaigns to show on timeline.

';\n return;\n }\n\n // Find date range with padding\n const today = new Date();\n let minDate = null, maxDate = null;\n const cData = [];\n for (const c of campaigns) {\n const start = new Date(c.start_date);\n const end = c.target_end_date ? new Date(c.target_end_date) : new Date(start);\n // Extend end by 30 days if no target end date\n const endAdj = c.target_end_date ? new Date(end) : new Date(Math.max(end.getTime(), today.getTime()));\n // Extend ongoing campaigns to today\n if (c.status !== 'Completed' && c.status !== 'On Hold' && endAdj < today) {\n endAdj.setTime(today.getTime());\n }\n if (!minDate || start < minDate) minDate = new Date(start);\n if (!maxDate || endAdj > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(endAdj);\n\n const lead = await apiFetch(`/api/leads/${c.team_lead_id}`);\n cData.push({ ...c, start, end: endAdj, leadName: lead.name });\n }\n\n // Add 1 month padding\n minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() - 1);\n maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n\n // Ensure today is within range\n if (today < minDate) minDate = new Date(today);\n if (today > maxDate) maxDate = new Date(today);\n maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() + 1);\n\n const totalMs = maxDate.getTime() - minDate.getTime();\n if (totalMs <= 0) return;\n\n // Generate month headers\n const months = [];\n const cursor = new Date(minDate.getFullYear(), minDate.getMonth(), 1);\n while (cursor <= maxDate) {\n months.push(new Date(cursor));\n cursor.setMonth(cursor.getMonth() + 1);\n }\n\n const monthNames = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];\n const monthWidth = 100 / months.length;\n\n const fmtDate = (d) => `${monthNames[d.getMonth()]} ${d.getDate()}`;\n\n let html = `\n
\n

Campaign Timeline

\n ${campaigns.length} campaigns · ${fmtDate(minDate)} — ${fmtDate(maxDate)}\n
\n
\n
\n ${months.map(m => `
${monthNames[m.getMonth()]} ${m.getFullYear()}
`).join('')}\n
\n
\n ${cData.map(c => {\n const pctStart = Math.max(0, (c.start.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100);\n const pctEnd = Math.min(100, Math.max(pctStart + 1, (c.end.getTime() - minDate.getTime()) / totalMs * 100));\n const pctWidth = pctEnd - pctStart;\n const statusClass = c.status.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-');\n const barLabel = c.name.length > 20 ? c.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : c.name;\n return `\n
\n
${c.name} · ${c.leadName}

The `window.API_URL` is hardcoded to the Render URL. So even when running locally, the frontend hits the Render backend which doesn't have the new endpoint yet.\n\nThe fix: I should change it so it uses the local backend by default when running locally, but use Render when deployed. \n\nThe best approach: set `window.API_URL` to `http://127.0.0.1:8000` by default and let the user (or the deployment process) override it for production. But the HTML is committed to git, so it should work both locally and on Render.\n\nWait, but Vercel serves the frontend. When the frontend is on Vercel, it needs to point to the Render backend. When running locally, it needs to point to the local backend.\n\nThe simplest fix: remove the hardcoded `window.API_URL` from the HTML, and let the `script.js` use the fallback `'http://127.0.0.1:8000'`. Then when deploying on Vercel, the user can add an environment variable or manually set it.\n\nBut actually, the user already deployed to Vercel with the Render URL set. If I remove it, Vercel will use the fallback which is `http://127.0.0.1:8000` which won't work from Vercel.\n\nA better approach: use the browser's hostname to detect if we're local or production. Or, simpler, just change the URL to point to the local server for now. The Render backend will eventually get the new code.\n\nActually, the real issue is that Render hasn't deployed the new code yet. Let me first check what's happening with Render. But the user said \"local doesnt work fine\" - that's because the frontend HTML points to Render, not localhost.\n\nLet me fix the HTML to use localhost by default, and add a comment about changing it for production. The user can switch it when deploying.\n\nActually, let me think about this differently. The user wants to test locally. So I should change `window.API_URL` to `http://127.0.0.1:8000` for local testing, and they can change it when deploying.\n\nBut wait, the Vercel deployment was already done with the Render URL. If I change it to localhost, Vercel will break. So I need a way to have both.\n\nBest approach: Use the `window.location` to detect if we're on localhost vs production.\n\n```js\n\n```\n\nThis way:\n- Local: opens on file:// or localhost \u2192 uses local API\n- Vercel: opens on vercel.app \u2192 uses Render API\n\nLet me apply this fix.", "time": {"start": 1782054157120, "end": 1782054163093}, "id": "prt_eeab47b40001FS37xX6AVJmsML", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab471b0002l2RiCrhAI0T2KW"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Found it. The HTML hardcodes the Render URL \u2014 so even locally, the frontend calls Render's API which doesn't have the new endpoint yet.", "time": {"start": 1782054163094, "end": 1782054164354}, "id": "prt_eeab49296001L72TapYVG40Gry", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab471b0002l2RiCrhAI0T2KW"}, {"type": "tool", "tool": "edit", "callID": "call_00_52CI9EyKdC0TqrLZeKZO2940", "state": {"status": "completed", "input": {"filePath": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/index.html", "oldString": " ", "newString": " "}, "output": "Edit applied successfully.", "metadata": {"diagnostics": {}, "diff": "Index: /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/index.html\n===================================================================\n--- /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/index.html\n+++ /Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp/frontend/index.html\n@@ -7,9 +7,13 @@\n \n \n \n \n- \n+ \n \n \n

"sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab5f4e8002I7SFLHOdusrRFM"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Both deployments are live with the new code. Here's a summary of what was fixed:\n\n**Bug 1 \u2014 Activity tab \"Not Found\"** (2 causes fixed):\n1. `window.API_URL` was hardcoded to Render URL in the HTML, so even local testing hit Render's old API. Fixed: now auto-detects local vs production based on `window.location.hostname`.\n2. Render hadn't deployed the new code yet (force-push confused the deploy hook). Fixed by pushing a clean commit.\n\n**Bug 2 \u2014 Timeline red line spanning full window**:\nMoved the today marker inside `.timeline-rows` (which has `position: relative`) instead of appending it as a sibling. Marker now correctly spans only the timeline rows.\n\n**Bug 3 \u2014 Lead name on same line as campaign**:\nChanged the timeline label to two lines \u2014 campaign name on top, lead name below in muted text.", "time": {"start": 1782054256857, "end": 1782054258625}, "id": "prt_eeab600d90012g5x3ex3uYrZ8Z", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab5f4e8002I7SFLHOdusrRFM"}, {"reason": "stop", "type": "step-finish", "tokens": {"total": 150461, "input": 123, "output": 194, "reasoning": 0, "cache": {"write": 0, "read": 150144}}, "cost": 0, "id": "prt_eeab607c3001fYzpd0Fe0gVudU", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab5f4e8002I7SFLHOdusrRFM"}]}, {"info": {"role": "user", "time": {"created": 1782054419631}, "agent": "build", "model": {"providerID": "opencode", "modelID": "deepseek-v4-flash-free"}, "summary": {"diffs": []}, "id": "msg_eeab87caf001IIQ2JAiqTN50Fc", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6"}, "parts": [{"type": "text", "text": "working fine now, we are done. now, how do i export the conversation I had in this session? The user can use the `/export` command within the tool, or use the CLI to export.\n\nLet me check if we can find the export functionality.", "time": {"start": 1782054422167, "end": 1782054423893}, "id": "prt_eeab88697001qxHTCFo8L5xBie", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab87cbc002yqcusXnLeLRZN4"}, {"type": "text", "text": "OpenCode stores session data locally. You can export the current session conversation as JSON using:\n\n```bash\nopencode log export\n```\n\nThis prints the entire session JSON. To save it to a file:\n\n```bash\nopencode log export > conversation.json\n```\n\nIf `opencode log` isn't available, check the chat history file directly:\n\n```bash\nls ~/.opencode/logs/\n```\n\nYour session logs are stored there as JSON files. Just grab the latest one.", "time": {"start": 1782054423894, "end": 1782054424846}, "id": "prt_eeab88d560018D9NitnM9k6d8B", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab87cbc002yqcusXnLeLRZN4"}, {"reason": "stop", "type": "step-finish", "tokens": {"total": 150740, "input": 3290, "output": 99, "reasoning": 151, "cache": {"write": 0, "read": 147200}}, "cost": 0, "id": "prt_eeab89110001M21mbFs6717Bbp", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab87cbc002yqcusXnLeLRZN4"}]}, {"info": {"role": "user", "time": {"created": 1782054495501}, "agent": "build", "model": {"providerID": "opencode", "modelID": "deepseek-v4-flash-free"}, "summary": {"diffs": []}, "id": "msg_eeab9a50d001rEZJTdWr5xpUc5", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6"}, "parts": [{"type": "text", "text": "yes do it for me and save this conversation in this session please", "id": "prt_eeab9a50e001p5YRgCeVd48Gg1", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab9a50d001rEZJTdWr5xpUc5"}]}, {"info": {"parentID": "msg_eeab9a50d001rEZJTdWr5xpUc5", "role": "assistant", "mode": "build", "agent": "build", "path": {"cwd": "/Users/suckstobeanik/Downloads/temp", "root": "/"}, "cost": 0, "tokens": {"total": 150811, "input": 205, "output": 164, "reasoning": 42, "cache": {"write": 0, "read": 150400}}, "modelID": "deepseek-v4-flash-free", "providerID": "opencode", "time": {"created": 1782054495514, "completed": 1782054499727}, "finish": "tool-calls", "id": "msg_eeab9a51a0027bXX48NImZ5kst", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6"}, "parts": [{"type": "step-start", "id": "prt_eeab9abf7001OA0dB9u7aVes0L", "sessionID": "ses_1164def0cffeO39qX3bHPu7Hq6", "messageID": "msg_eeab9a51a0027bXX48NImZ5kst"}, {"type": "reasoning", "text": "The user wants me to export the current session conversation and save it as a JSON file in this session's directory. \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2588 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2584 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2588 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2588 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2588\n\u2588 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2580\n\u2580\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2588\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2580\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2580 \u2580 \u2580\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2580\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2580\u2580\u2580\u2580 \u2580\u2580\u2580\u2580\n\nCommands:\n opencode completion generate shell completion script\n opencode acp start ACP (Agent Client Protocol) server\n opencode mcp manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers\n opencode [project] start opencode tui [default]\n opencode attach attach to a running opencode server\n opencode run [message..] run opencode with a message\n opencode debug debugging and troubleshooting tools\n opencode providers manage AI providers and credentials [aliases: auth]\n opencode agent manage agents\n opencode upgrade [target] upgrade opencode to the latest or a specific version\n opencode uninstall uninstall opencode and remove all related files\n opencode serve starts a headless opencode server\n opencode web start opencode server and open web interface\n opencode models [provider] list all available models\n opencode stats show token usage and cost statistics\n opencode export [sessionID] export session data as JSON\n opencode import import session data from JSON file or URL\n opencode github manage GitHub agent\n opencode pr fetch and checkout a GitHub PR branch, then run opencode\n opencode session manage sessions\n opencode plugin install plugin and update config [aliases: plug]\n opencode db database tools\n\nPositionals:\n project path to start opencode in [string]\n\nOptions:\n -h, --help show help [boolean]\n -v, --version show version number [boolean]\n --print-logs print logs to stderr [boolean]\n --log-level log level [string] [choices: \"DEBUG\", \"INFO\", \"WARN\", \"ERROR\"]\n --pure run without external plugins [boolean]\n --port port to listen on [number] [default: 0]\n --hostname hostname to listen on [string] [default: \"127.0.0.1\"]\n --mdns enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)\n [boolean] [default: false]\n --mdns-domain custom domain name for mDNS service (default: opencode.local)\n [string] [default: \"opencode.local\"]\n --cors additional domains to allow for CORS [array] [default: []]\n -m, --model model to use in the format of provider/model [string]\n -c, --continue continue the last session [boolean]\n -s, --session session id to continue [string]\n --fork fork the session when continuing (use with --continue or --session) [boolean]\n --prompt prompt to use [string]\n --agent agent to use [string]\n---\nls: /Users/suckstobeanik/.opencode/logs/: No such file or directory\nls: /Users/suckstobeanik/.claude/logs/: No such file or directory\ntrying other paths\nls: opencode attach attach to a running opencode server\n opencode run [message..] run opencode with a message\n opencode debug debugging and troubleshooting tools\n opencode providers manage AI providers and credentials [aliases: auth]\n opencode agent manage agents\n opencode upgrade [target] upgrade opencode to the latest or a specific version\n opencode uninstall uninstall opencode and remove all related files\n opencode serve starts a headless opencode server\n opencode web start opencode server and open web interface\n opencode models [provider] list all available models\n opencode stats show token usage and cost statistics\n opencode export [sessionID] export session data as JSON\n opencode import import session data from JSON file or URL\n opencode github manage GitHub agent\n opencode pr fetch and checkout a GitHub PR branch, then run opencode\n opencode session manage sessions\n opencode plugin install plugin and update config [aliases: plug]\n opencode db database tools\n\nPositionals:\n project path to start opencode in [string]\n\nOptions:\n -h, --help show help [boolean]\n -v, --version show version number [boolean]\n --print-logs print logs to stderr [boolean]\n --log-level log level [string] [choices: \"DEBUG\", \"INFO\", \"WARN\", \"ERROR\"]\n --pure run without external plugins [boolean]\n --port port to listen on [number] [default: 0]\n --hostname hostname to listen on [string] [default: \"127.0.0.1\"]\n --mdns enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)\n [boolean] [default: false]\n --mdns-domain custom domain name for mDNS service (default: opencode.local)\n [string] [default: \"opencode.local\"]\n --cors additional domains to allow for CORS [array] [default: []]\n -m, --model model to use in the format of provider/model [string]\n -c, --continue continue the last session [boolean]\n -s, --session session id to continue [string]\n --fork fork the session when continuing (use with --continue or --session) [boolean]\n --prompt prompt to use [string]\n --agent agent to use [string]\n---\nls: /Users/suckstobeanik/.opencode/logs/: No such file or directory\nls: /Users/suckstobeanik/.claude/logs/: No such file or directory\ntrying other paths\nls: /Users/suckstobeanik/Library/Application Support/opencode/logs/: No such file or directory\nls: No messages in this session.
'; statusEl.textContent = '0 messages'; return; } // Stats const userCount = messages.filter(m => m.info?.role === 'user').length; const asstCount = messages.filter(m => m.info?.role === 'assistant').length; const model = info.model || (messages.find(m => m.info?.model)?.info?.model) || {}; const modelStr = model.providerID + '/' + model.modelID || 'unknown'; statusEl.innerHTML = `
${messages.length}total messages
${userCount}user
${asstCount}assistant
${modelStr.split('/').pop()}model
`; let html = ''; for (const msg of messages) { const role = msg.info?.role || 'unknown'; const time = msg.info?.time?.created || null; const agent = msg.info?.agent || ''; const parts = msg.parts || []; // Group parts: collect all text, reasoning, tools let textParts = []; let reasoningParts = []; let toolParts = []; for (const p of parts) { if (p.type === 'text' && p.text) textParts.push(p.text); else if (p.type === 'reasoning' && p.text) reasoningParts.push(p.text); else if (p.type === 'tool') { toolParts.push(JSON.stringify(p, null, 2).slice(0, 2000)); } } const fullText = textParts.join('\n\n'); const timeStr = time ? fmtTime(time) : ''; const agentLabel = agent ? ` via ${agent}` : ''; if (role === 'user') { html += `
${escapeHtml(fullText) || '(file upload or empty)'}
${timeStr}${agentLabel}
`; } else if (role === 'assistant') { let body = ''; // Text content if (fullText) { body += `
${escapeHtml(fullText)}
`; } // Reasoning (collapsible) for (let i = 0; i < reasoningParts.length; i++) { const rid = 'r-' + msg.info?.id + '-' + i; body += `
🔬 Show reasoning (${reasoningParts[i].length} chars)
${escapeHtml(reasoningParts[i])}
`; } // Tool calls (collapsible) for (let i = 0; i < toolParts.length; i++) { const tid = 't-' + msg.info?.id + '-' + i; body += `
🔧 Tool call ${toolParts.length > 1 ? '#' + (i+1) : ''} 
${escapeHtml(toolParts[i])}
`; } if (!body) { body = `
(no text response)
`; } html += `
${body}
${timeStr}${agentLabel}
`; } } chatEl.innerHTML = html; // Auto-scroll to bottom after a delay setTimeout(() => chatEl.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'end' }), 100); } function escapeHtml(str) { if (!str) return ''; return str .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"'); }
